classification.description: Deed of charge and security agreement

particulars.description: Fixed and floating charge over all of the chargor's rights, title and interest in and to certain assets in relation to the feature film provisionally entitled "a most wanted man" as more particularly set out on the security agreement.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee under the terms of the aforementioned instrument creating or evidencing the charge

persons_entitled.name: FILM4, a Division of Channel Four Television Corporation

particulars.description: All right title and interest in and to all rights of every kind and nature in and to the screenplay and the literary property; all copyrights rights in copyrights interests in copyrights and renewals and extension of copyrights domestic and foreign heretofore or hereafter in or obtained in connection with the film provisionally entitled "a most wanted man" see image for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee under the terms of the aforementioned instrument creating or evidencing the charge

particulars.description: All right title and interest in and to all rights of every kind and nature in and to the screenplay meaning the screenplay entitled "a most wanted man" and the literary property. All copyrights rights in copyrights interest in copyrights and renewals and extension of copyrights domestic and foreign heretofore or hereafter in or obtained in connection with the film and the right to make any publication thereof for copyright purposes see image for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from any relevant person to the chargee on any account whatsoever under the terms of the aforementioned instruments creating or evidencing the charge

persons_entitled.name: Compagnie Pour Le Financement Des Loisirs S.A.
